Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Default
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT T-BIRD RESTAURANT GROUP, INC's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Default is off calendar. This court lacks jurisdiction to hear this motion because of the pending appeals before the Court of Appeal. An order granting the motion to vacate would undermine the appeal and cross-appeal. (CCP 916; Elsea v. Saberi (1992) 4 Cal.App.4th 625.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
